Epistle × Gospel heatmap

Book-to-book aggregation · where do NT letters lexically intersect each Gospel?

Aggregates all candidate rows from the automatic retrieval layers (layers epistles_to_gospels and john_to_synoptic) into a source-book × target-book matrix. Four metrics can be toggled: total candidates, hits above score 0.35, hits with exact run ≥ 4 tokens, and the best single score for that cell. Note: a large cell count usually means "lots of opportunity for retrieval noise" not "lots of real dependence" — the best score and exact-run metrics are more diagnostic. Click any cell to see the single highest-scoring hit for that book pair.

Low
High (—)
